output.summary: Add openOnImageClick={false} to ImageDropUploader in FooterInfo.tsx and FooterInfoSocialItem.tsx to prevent media library opening on click, and add inlineSVG={true} to FooterInfo.tsx logo to render SVGs inline in the editor.

fileChanges.description: Add openOnImageClick={false} and inlineSVG={true} props to ImageDropUploader for the logo
fileChanges.details: On the ImageDropUploader component (line ~82-88), add two props: openOnImageClick={false} to prevent clicking the logo image from opening the media library, and inlineSVG={true} to render SVG logos inline in the editor (matching the PHP side which already uses theme_output_svg_or_img).

fileChanges.description: Add openOnImageClick={false} to ImageDropUploader for the social icon placeholder
fileChanges.details: On the ImageDropUploader component (line ~226-235), add openOnImageClick={false} to prevent clicking the placeholder icon area from opening the media library. Users can still add/replace icons via the toolbar MediaUpload button or the InspectorControls panel.

designDecisions.decision: Disable click-to-open media library on footer logo ImageDropUploader
designDecisions.evidence: User explicitly requested openOnImageClick={false} for FooterInfo logo

designDecisions.decision: Disable click-to-open media library on social icon ImageDropUploader
designDecisions.evidence: User explicitly requested openOnImageClick={false} for FooterInfoSocialItem icon

designDecisions.decision: Enable inline SVG rendering for footer logo in editor
designDecisions.evidence: User explicitly requested inlineSVG={true} for FooterInfo logo. PHP side already handles SVGs via theme_output_svg_or_img().
